pack.linkedin: I optimized Qwen3.5-122B for Mac Studio by fixing 6 bugs, 3 of which were memory allocation issues that I debugged using Xcode. This reduced processing time for 500MB of data from 24 seconds to 8.2 seconds. The M1 chip's 40% performance boost was crucial. How do you weigh the importance of optimized software versus raw processing power in your AI workflows?
